# FormSuite

FormSuite is the official website for a portfolio of lightweight Google Workspace add-ons for Google Forms and Google Sheets operators.

Production site:

https://formsuite.dev/

## Published install-first add-ons

- FormGuard: response limits, close dates, choice quotas, and form availability controls.
- FormNotifier: Google Forms confirmation emails and owner notifications.
- FormCopy Pro: copy formulas, formats, and helper columns into new response rows.
- FormMerge Pro: personalized operational email merge from Google Sheets rows.
- DocForge: generate Google Docs and PDFs from Google Sheets rows and Google Docs templates.
- FormRanger: sync Google Forms choices from selected Google Sheets data.
- FormFlow: lightweight Google Forms approval workflows with reviewer emails and linked Sheet status.

## Priority pages

- FormSuite homepage: https://formsuite.dev/
- Product chooser: https://formsuite.dev/choose-google-workspace-addon.html
- FormRanger: https://formsuite.dev/formranger/
- FormFlow: https://formsuite.dev/formflow/
- FormRanger first-run checklist: https://formsuite.dev/formranger/test-google-forms-dynamic-choices-before-launch.html
- FormFlow first-run checklist: https://formsuite.dev/formflow/test-google-forms-approval-workflow-before-launch.html

## FormRanger choice-sync guides

Use FormRanger when a form owner needs owner-controlled Google Sheets to Google Forms choice refresh before respondents use the form.

- Auto update Google Forms dropdown from Google Sheets: https://formsuite.dev/formranger/auto-update-google-forms-dropdown-from-google-sheets.html
- Google Forms long dropdown list from Google Sheets: https://formsuite.dev/formranger/google-forms-long-dropdown-list-from-google-sheets.html
- Import Google Forms choices from Google Sheets: https://formsuite.dev/formranger/import-google-forms-choices-from-google-sheets.html
- Populate Google Forms multiple-choice options from Google Sheets: https://formsuite.dev/formranger/populate-google-forms-multiple-choice-from-google-sheets.html
- Google Forms checkbox list from Google Sheets: https://formsuite.dev/formranger/google-forms-checkbox-list-from-google-sheets.html
- Google Forms grid choices from Google Sheets: https://formsuite.dev/formranger/google-forms-grid-choices-from-google-sheets.html
- Google Forms dropdown from Google Sheets without Apps Script: https://formsuite.dev/formranger/google-forms-dropdown-from-google-sheets-without-apps-script.html
- Google Forms dropdown not updating from Google Sheets: https://formsuite.dev/formranger/google-forms-dropdown-not-updating-from-google-sheets.html
- Dynamic drop down lists from Google Sheets into Google Forms / dependent dropdown limits: https://formsuite.dev/formranger/google-forms-dependent-dropdown-from-google-sheets.html
- FormRanger support: https://formsuite.dev/formranger/support.html
- FormRanger permissions: https://formsuite.dev/formranger/permissions.html

FormRanger supports dropdown, multiple choice, checkbox, multiple-choice grid, and checkbox grid choices. It is not a live respondent-time dependent dropdown system, inventory lock, booking system, or payment workflow.

## FormFlow approval workflow guides

Use FormFlow when a form owner needs a lightweight Google Forms approval workflow with one or more reviewer decisions and linked Google Sheets status.

- Google Forms approval workflow guide: https://formsuite.dev/formflow/google-forms-approval-workflow-guide.html
- Test a Google Forms approval workflow before launch: https://formsuite.dev/formflow/test-google-forms-approval-workflow-before-launch.html
- Approve or reject Google Forms responses by email: https://formsuite.dev/formflow/approve-reject-google-forms-responses-by-email.html
- Track approval status in Google Sheets: https://formsuite.dev/formflow/google-forms-approval-status-in-google-sheets.html
- Google Forms approval workflow without Apps Script: https://formsuite.dev/formflow/google-forms-approval-workflow-without-apps-script.html
- Free Google Forms approval workflow: https://formsuite.dev/formflow/free-google-forms-approval-workflow.html
- FormFlow support: https://formsuite.dev/formflow/support.html
- FormFlow permissions and privacy: https://formsuite.dev/formflow/privacy-policy.html

FormFlow focuses on small Google Forms approval workflows: select the linked response Sheet, add one approver, run Preflight, submit one internal test response, confirm the reviewer email, approve or reject, and verify the linked Sheet status. It is not a full procurement platform, ticketing system, CRM, legal approval platform, or enterprise compliance suite.

## Public funnel

1. Choose the right add-on.
2. Install from Google Workspace Marketplace.
3. Run one small first-use test.
4. Use support or feedback if setup fails.
5. Request a review only after a successful first-run outcome.

## Contact

- Website: https://formsuite.dev/
- General support: https://formsuite.dev/support.html
- Privacy: https://formsuite.dev/privacy.html
- Terms: https://formsuite.dev/terms.html
